entries.parsedImagePrompt: Full shot, eye-level angle, wide perspective from behind, static frame. 2 distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left of the frame, the male silhouette with short dark brown neatly side-parted hair, wearing a heathered gray merino wool v-neck sweater over a light blue Oxford button-down shirt with rolled sleeves, faded slim-fit blue jeans, brown leather low-top sneakers with white soles, and a slim silver watch on his left wrist, pauses mid-stride. On the right of the frame, the female silhouette with medium-length wavy dark brown hair, wearing a light green cardigan over a white cotton blouse, light blue jeans, and white canvas sneakers, carries a gray backpack and pauses mid-stride, holding a light green umbrella dotted with rain droplets. They lean forward together, sharing the umbrella, their forms sharply silhouetted against the luminous white curtain of rain that fills the background. The scene unfolds in front of a coffee shop: a wide awning spans the top of the frame, a glass entrance door sits center-left, a puddle gathers at the awning's edge on the right, and a rain-slicked sidewalk stretches beneath their feet. Blurred pedestrians with umbrellas pass indistinctly in the distant background. Ambient backlight from the white rain curtain creates soft, diffused high-key silhouettes, bathed in a cool white-blue color tone with a soft rainy atmosphere. Deep depth of field (T8.0) keeps the entire scene sharply in focus from the wet foreground sidewalk to the distant vanishing point. Japanese anime art style, clean crisp line art, fresh vibrant colors, premium high-quality anime CG, 2.5D semi-realistic style, iray rendering with physically accurate lighting. Skin and face detail tags are omitted as the characters are viewed from behind as silhouettes.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] Rainy urban street under a wide coffee shop awning. Heavy rain strikes the metal awning with crisp metallic impacts, water splashing sharply into puddles on the wet pavement. Distant thunder rumbles softly. Wet shoes shift on concrete with subtle scraping sounds as the two figures move through the frame. Blurred pedestrians with umbrellas hurry through the deep background. Continuous rainfall fills the background with steady white noise.
[Characters] Minh: Approximately twenty-five years old, Male, symmetrical face with almond dark brown eyes, straight nose, full lips. Fair smooth skin. Short dark brown neatly side-parted hair. Slim build. Light blue Oxford shirt under heathered gray v-neck sweater, faded slim jeans, brown leather sneakers with white soles, silver watch on left wrist. Emotional state: walking briskly, leaning forward. Linh: Approximately twenty-five years old, Female, soft oval face, large almond dark brown eyes, curved brows, straight nose, full lips. Medium-length wavy dark brown loose hair, slightly damp ends. Slender build. White blouse under light green cardigan, light blue jeans, white canvas sneakers. Gray backpack on shoulders, right hand holding light green umbrella dotted with rain droplets. Emotional state: holding umbrella tightly, matching pace.
Shot 1 (Wide Shot, 2s): Locked-off camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Action: Minh and Linh continue their rapid pace side by side, the light green umbrella bobbing gently as it shelters them both. Rain intensifies around them, sweeping diagonally across the pavement in translucent white streaks. Minh's gray sweater darkens slightly as rain soaks its exposed shoulder. Linh's hair sways with each stride, damp strands trailing behind.
Shot 2 (Wide Shot, 2s): Locked-off camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Action: Their figures grow smaller as they move deeper into the rainy street, the white curtain of rain thickening between the camera and the umbrella. The umbrella's bright green becomes a smaller, softer point of color against the cool blue-gray atmosphere. Blurred pedestrians continue moving in the background while rain beats steadily against the awning above. The silhouettes of Minh and Linh finally dissolve into the downpour, swallowed by the sweeping rain.
